title: mimulus linearis var. lutea
intro: Mimulus linearis var. lutea, also known as Monkey Flower, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Phrymaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues. The plant has been used in herbal preparations to promote wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function, offering potential health benefits such as improved respiratory health and reduced risk of illness. Mimulus linearis var. lutea can be found in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile plant for natural health and wellness.
